pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guava versions may contain bytecode or API incompatibilities with JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version supporting Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support compiling for Java 21 target.
